methodology_pass_1: Static review of YAML + embedded Python; AlphaLoader loose/strict load; codebase tracing of UniverseSynchronizer → CrossSectionalContext → CompositionEngine; pytest subset. No walk-forward PnL or live-slippage evidence audited.
methodology_pass_2: Re-verified shipped YAML vs tree after remediation: AlphaLoader strict/loose (tests/alpha/test_shipped_alpha_specs_load.py); UniverseSynchronizer cross-horizon fan-in + signals_by_strategy_by_symbol (tests/composition/test_synchronizer.py); PORTFOLIO integration paths (tests/integration/test_xsect_v1_e2e.py, test_mixed_mechanism_e2e.py). Scores rescaled from pass-1 model with BLOCKER cleared for composition-feed; still no profitability audit.

inventory_columns.note: Mechanism family omitted for PORTFOLIO rows (multiple consumes); regime_gate N/A for PORTFOLIO.

alphas.regime_gate: hmm_3state_fractional; on P(normal)>0.7 and abs(spread_z_30d)<0.5; off P(normal)<0.5 or spread_z_30d>1.5

findings.finding: Pass 1 HIGH (VWAP/TWAP vs KYLE narrative) cleared: hypothesis reframed to Kyle-style footprint with slicing as modality; l1_signature_sensors lists kyle_lambda_60s plus OFI/micro/spread sensors.

trend_mechanism.l1_signature_sensors includes kyle_lambda_60s but depends_on_sensors and evaluate() only consume ofi_ewma_zscore (plus regime/snapshot gates)—the fingerprint sensor is not read in signal logic. Either wire λ into evaluate for mechanism coherence or document fingerprint-as-attribution-only and accept weaker Inv-1 traceability at runtime.
findings.evidence: YAML depends_on_sensors vs trend_mechanism.l1_signature_sensors vs signal: block
findings.recommended_action: Add kyle_lambda to depends_on_sensors + snapshot reads, or narrow l1_signature_sensors to evaluated features.

findings.finding: No per-alpha promotion.gate_thresholds; falsification criteria reference forward correlations and DSR — testable but not wired to CI artifacts in this audit.
findings.recommended_action: Attach measurable promotion evidence gates when promoting beyond research.

findings.finding: Loads under AlphaLoader with enforce_trend_mechanism true and false.

alphas.regime_gate: on P(normal)>0.6 and spread_z_30d<=1.0; off P(normal)<0.4 or spread_z_30d>2.0

findings.finding: Hypothesis and YAML cite forward 300s return correlations for falsification — descriptive only; signal code uses snapshot/regime only (no lookahead in evaluate).
findings.recommended_action: Keep falsification as research metrics; ensure research notebooks never leak forward returns into features.

findings.finding: horizon_seconds/expected_half_life_seconds = 300/600 = 0.5 (G16 lower bound); intentional.
Pass 1 HIGH cleared: margin_ratio raised to 1.6 (above Inv-12 minimum); falsification half-life band aligned to G16 INVENTORY [5, 60]s.
Pass 1 HIGH (30s feeder invisible at 300s PORTFOLIO barriers) cleared by synchronizer multi-horizon fan-in and per-strategy context map.
Margin still modest versus aggressive stress scenarios; CPCV / OOS economics remain unaudited.
findings.recommended_action: Stress at 2× cost in research harness before promotion.

findings.finding: Pass 1 HIGH cleared for mixed PORTFOLIO feeder use: cross-horizon fan-in supplies hawkes signals at 300s barriers.
hazard_exit.enabled true — wired for Phase 4.1 hazard path per platform skill docs.

alphas.regime_gate: on scheduled_flow_window_active==1 and seconds_to_window_close>60; off window inactive or seconds_to_window_close<30

findings.finding: Trade relies on scheduled_flow_window_direction_prior and calendar-backed sensor; economically valid only if prior is knowable at boundary timestamp (exchange-published / deterministic calendar). Audit did not re-verify sensor implementation against live feed latency.
findings.recommended_action: Document feed latency + staleness in sensor spec; add functional tests under pytest -m functional if available.

findings.finding: horizon_seconds/expected_half_life_seconds = 120/240 = 0.5 at G16 floor.

Pass 1 BLOCKER cleared: bootstrap supplies union of portfolio + feeder horizons and upstream strategy ids; synchronizer attaches latest-per-strategy signals at 300s barriers including 30s inventory feeder.
max_gross_exposure_pct=50 and capital_allocation_pct=100 are aggressive for deploy-small posture; acceptable only as integration fixture scale.
Hypothesis remains performance-target (Sharpe≥1) without standalone structural mechanism beyond feeder aggregation — acceptable as harness, not as economic proof.
findings.recommended_action: Treat as benchmark harness; require CPCV/OOS before promotion narrative.

findings.finding: Pass 1 BLOCKER cleared: decay path receives feeder signals via the same multi-horizon context as baseline xsect v1.
Same fixture-scale risk posture as pofi_xsect_v1.
Pass 1 BLOCKER cleared: dual 30s feeders reach 300s composition via cross-horizon selection + multi-feeder rank aggregation.
Pass 1 LOW typo (HAWKES_SELF_EXCITING) cleared in description — uses HAWKES_SELF_EXCITE.
Fixture-scale gross / capital_allocation identical to other reference PORTFOLIO specs.

cross_alpha_findings.finding: Pass 1 BLOCKER (multi-horizon depends_on_signals vs single-horizon synchronizer) remediated: runtime fan-in + ranker multi-feeder path exercised by tests.

platform.yaml alpha_specs still lists only pofi_benign_midcap_v1 for default bootstrap — extended sensor_specs reduce sensor-coverage gap for local bundles but operators must still enumerate alpha_specs for multi-alpha deployments.
cross_alpha_findings.recommended_action: Document bundle recipes or add example multi-alpha platform overlay.

cross_alpha_findings.finding: AGENTS.md documents acceptance drift: baseline alpha trend_mechanism vs tests expecting v0.2 parity.
cross_alpha_findings.evidence: AGENTS.md Known pre-existing acceptance test failures
cross_alpha_findings.recommended_action: Reconcile tests or baseline YAML policy.

test_coverage_findings.finding: tests/alpha/test_shipped_alpha_specs_load.py discovers and loads all eight shipped specs under loose and strict trend_mechanism enforcement.
tests/composition/test_ranker_multi_feeder.py locks marginal raw-score aggregation across feeders.
Integration e2e may still produce sparse or degenerate intents when live replay lacks feeder emissions — distinct from horizon wiring.
test_coverage_findings.recommended_action: Optional: assert non-empty intent when synthetic feeds guarantee signals.

recommended_actions.action: PASS 2: PORTFOLIO vs feeder horizon contract satisfied in code — no further P0 on composition-feed wiring.
Align pofi_benign_midcap_v1 runtime snapshot reads with kyle_lambda_60s fingerprint or narrow declared fingerprint sensors.
Tighten reference PORTFOLIO risk_budget defaults for any non-fixture deployment path.
PASS 2: Inventory falsification band aligned — closed.
Reconcile AGENTS.md acceptance drift (baseline YAML vs v0.2 parity tests).
